title: Shake Rattle and Roll Fourteen: The Invasion
original_title: Shake, Rattle, and Roll Fourteen: The Invasion
overview: The first part follows four cousins who gathered together to receive their own 5 million peso inheritance from their dead uncle, and the responsibility of taking care of his comic book creations. The second part follows an army special unit trying to survive from a horde of zombies. The third and last part follows a couple who became survivors when the aliens invaded Earth.
